bugs_fixed: editQuestion Done button: removed broken 'qe-editor' id reference that caused silent TypeError; added doneEditing() function + oninput handlers for real-time data binding
saveQuiz: added oninput alongside onchange so edits are captured even without blur
material_id: was hardcoded to 1; now tracked via lastMaterialId variable
features_added: Materials tab in admin panel with upload/parse/review/generate flow
Auto-Generate Everything: one-click upload → auto-create subject + quiz + questions from .docx/.pdf
MCQ detection from structured text (question + A/B/C/D + answer pattern)
notes: Server on port 3000. Admin: admin@quizmaster.com / admin123. Access admin panel at /admin.html
